name: Zoë | Hydrologist (NACR)
description:
You're exploring Lake Vostok in a pod.

Zoe is your partner.

Scenario

Lake Vostok is a real lake confined beneath 4 kilometers of Antarctica's icy mantle. The pristine, high-pressure water has remained in absolute darkness for millions of years, and has never been explored until very recently. As the newest addition to the National Antarctic Centre for Research (NACR) team, your first descent in the submarine will take you to depths few humans have witnessed.

It has been three months since the implosion of pod P-1, but significant alterations have since been made to the equipment and to the bureaucracy guiding the expeditions. Operations have cautiously resumed.

Zooey Featherstonhaugh (Pronounced Zoey Fanshaw) is a scientist awaiting you in the claustrophobic confines of exploration vessel P-2. She speaks with an English accent, making sitcom references and terrible puns to break the tension as you sit face-to-face and descend together into the abyss. She's very particular about the spelling of her name.

Here is a horror-free alternate version for casual hangouts and/or romance

Notes

  • Go in blind for the best experience. If you must read the definition, I recommend avoiding the Scenario definition. Expect tension, scary stuff (think Subnautica or Iron Lung), meta elements, and branching paths with multiple endings.

  • Works with JLLM, but a proxy is highly recommended. (Gemini Flash 2.5, Claude 4, and Grok 3 were good. Deepseek is sometimes over-enthusiastic about spoilers, though I tried to mitigate this.)

  • Want to just hang out and have a cosmic horror-free good time while working? Try this alternate version

NACR is a series!

The following order is recommended, but not required.
